content.en:
The meeting in Black Wind Mountain ended quickly, and this time the Eternal Dao Ancestors and Divine Ruins Dao Ancestors asked Ye Tian to lead the team and go to the medium-sized Forbidden Void Realm, striving to capture the Forbidden Void Realm.

And there are as many as 100 Supreme Dao Ancestors led by Ye Tian, and it can be seen that Black Wind Mountain is also bound to win the Forbidden Void Realm.

At the same time, the three Nine Heavens forces and the Heavenly Emperor Palace had also sent many Supreme Dao Ancestors to that medium-sized forbidden void realm.

Judging from the number of Supreme Dao Ancestors, the Supreme Dao Ancestors of Black Wind Mountain far surpass the three Nine Heavens forces, and the Supreme Dao Ancestors of Black Wind Mountain are not weak, only a few of the Supreme Dao Ancestors under the command of the Invincible Dao Ancestor or the Half-Step Domain Ancestor are slightly weak, and the other Supreme Dao Ancestors are all the Ten Kings of the previous years, all of them are powerful, comparable to the top Supreme Dao Ancestors.

But Ye Tian also knew very well that this time the hidden Supreme Dao Ancestors of the major forces would probably also appear, for example, Black Wind Mountain had mobilized more than 100 Supreme Dao Ancestors, and there were no more than 100 Supreme Dao Ancestors in the Black Wind Mountain base!

The Heavenly Emperor Palace and the Black Wind Mountain actually had the ability to exterminate the Forbidden Zerg, but they did not do their best, because the current threat of the Forbidden Zerg was not too great, and they needed to use the Forbidden Zerg to strengthen the Xuanxu Ancient Realm.

This is tantamount to raising Gu!

That's why they choose to fight a protracted battle with the Forbidden Zerg and hide their strength.

But the medium-sized Forbidden Void Realm is different, that is the real big opportunity, which is enough for a force to develop rapidly, and they will naturally do their best to snatch the authority of the Forbidden Void Realm.

Therefore, this time I am afraid that they will fight each other, and the alliance will also break down temporarily.

However, the Half-Step Domain Ancestors were also worried that if the Invincible Dao Ancestor participated, it would cause the Invincible Dao Ancestor to fall too much, which would affect the final plan, so they only allowed the Supreme Dao Ancestor to participate in it.

This is a good thing for Ye Tian, his strength is almost unknown to many people, others only know that he has stepped into the ranks of the strongest Dao Ancestors, but he has never exposed the forbidden Dao technique in front of others, and the battle also maintains a hidden strength.

But this time, in order to compete for that medium-sized forbidden void realm, he had to show his true strength.

---------------

Before leaving, Ye Tian contacted Ouyang Jiu'er and asked Ouyang Jiu'er if she was interested in snatching that medium-sized forbidden void realm, but Ouyang Jiu'er refused.

In Ouyang Jiu'er's words, her identity is a little special, and there are also some incomparably ancient existences at the Supreme Dao Ancestor level, maybe you know her, once there is a battle, your identity will be accidentally exposed.

After all, although Ouyang Jiu'er said that the path he took was different from his previous life, there were also a considerable number of common places, and there were some unique forbidden dao techniques, which others would not, after all, everyone's forbidden dao techniques were comprehended by themselves, and once they were used, their identities would be easily exposed.

Therefore, Ouyang Jiu'er was not ready to go.

But Ouyang Jiu'er lent Ye Tian a treasure, which was the town boundary monument.

At the beginning, Ouyang Jiu'er used the town boundary monument to silently refine the small forbidden void realm, and by the way, he also pitted the stone eagle Dao Ancestor of the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

The Town Boundary Monument can also be used to refine the Medium-sized Forbidden Void Realm, but the rules of the Medium-Sized Forbidden Void Realm are extremely perfect, and it is difficult to find loopholes, so it is impossible to refine the Medium-sized Forbidden Void Realm silently.

However, if you use the Town Boundary Monument to refine the medium-sized Forbidden Void Realm, it will be many times easier, and the speed is relatively fast, and the success rate is much higher.

If there was no Town Boundary Monument, it would be too difficult to refine the medium-sized Forbidden Void Realm, and even a large number of Supreme Dao Ancestors would be needed to block other Supreme Dao Ancestors for him, and use his life to pile up, so that he could be expected to refine the Forbidden Void Realm.

......

Xuan Xuan Ancient Realm.

The medium-sized Forbidden Void Realm gradually stabilized, and a powerful Dao Ancestor came here, making many Sixfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors and Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors who were originally watching here very nervous, and they also wanted to enter the Medium-sized Forbidden Void Realm to find forbidden strange objects and forbidden treasures.

But looking at this situation now, the strongest Dao Ancestors are coming one by one, and the fight is probably very tragic, and the possibility of their fall is too great.

As a result, many weak Dao Ancestors left one by one, leaving only a few Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors who planned to take a risk, after all, once they had a big harvest, they would also be able to step into the ranks of the strongest Dao Ancestors.

Wow!!!!

A group of people dressed in black robes and masks descended.

Everyone recognized it, these were the strongest Dao Ancestors of Black Wind Mountain, and the leader was Ye Tian, one of the Ten Kings of Black Wind Mountain.

Ye Tian's gaze mainly looked in four directions, namely the Heavenly Emperor Palace, the Mitian Sect, the Heavenly Sea Sect, and the Ten Thousand Domains Divine Temple, and he found that he saw many Supreme Dao Ancestors who had never appeared before.

The Fire King stood beside Ye Tian and said: "Dark King, you have to pay attention to the following Supreme Dao Ancestors, over there in the Heavenly Emperor Palace, the Dao Ancestor with long red hair is called Yan Ancestor, and he is an extremely ancient Supreme Dao Ancestor, it is rumored that the reason why he cannot be promoted to Invincible Dao Ancestor is not that his potential and strength are not enough, and he has been hit hard, so it is difficult to be promoted to the Invincible Dao Ancestor level, but his strength is very strong, he has created many Supreme Dao Techniques, and he has cultivated the Supreme Dao Techniques to the extreme level one by one, the power of the flesh, The power of the soul and the power of the Dao have also basically been cultivated to the Supreme Dao Ancestor!"

Ye Tian was also slightly surprised, creating multiple supreme Dao techniques, and cultivating supreme Dao techniques to the extreme level, this was indeed very terrifying.

In addition, by copying talents, he did see that the other party had multiple Dao-level natal talents, which showed that he had obtained many opportunities, which was able to give birth to so many Dao-level natal talents.

I'm afraid that the previous Wind King was far from being able to compete with this Yan Ancestor!

Then, the Fire King continued: "The sturdy young man in the Heavenly Emperor Palace who exudes black light is the Xuanhu Dao Ancestor, it is said that he has an invincible defense, even some weaker Invincible Dao Ancestors have not been able to break his defenses, it is said that he has cultivated more than six defensive supreme Dao techniques, and he has cultivated them to the limit level one by one. The key is that the six defensive supreme dao techniques he created can complement each other, almost a system of supreme dao techniques, which can be perfectly amplified, which is why they are so terrifying!"

After introducing the two supreme Dao Ancestors of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, the Fire King began to introduce the Heavenly Scale Dao Ancestor of the Tianhai Sect, the Heavenless Dao Ancestor of the Mitian Sect, and the Kunxing Dao Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Domains Temple.

The strength of these three Dao Ancestors is also second only to Xuanhu Dao Ancestor and Yan Ancestor, and Black Wind Mountain also has a comparable Dao Ancestor, and he is also among the more than 100 Dao Ancestors this time, but he is very low-key, and obeys the orders of the two half-step domain ancestors, led by Ye Tian.

This Dao Ancestor is the fourth generation of the Black Wind Mountain level Sky King, the Nirvana Dao Ancestor!
